mapper.insert:
SELECT DBMS_RANDOM.STRING('L', 20) STR FROM DUAL
insert into PTproduct(PT_no,PT_title,PT_content,pt_name,PT_Price,PT_photourl,Calendar_before,Calendar_after,PT_id,PT_Registration,PT_code) values(no_seq.nextval,#{PT_title},#{PT_content},#{pt_name},#{PT_Price},#{PT_photourl},null,null,#{PT_id},default,#{PT_code})
